long_description:
[Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage is Triggered on mzone727-zonelet01

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/genctl-network-high-cpu-memory-usage.html
TIP Short Description: fabcon-manager in mzone727-zonelet01 is using over 80% of CPU limit
TIP Situation: Observed issue in service-error-Daemonset High Memory Usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone727-zonelet01::

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{container_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager", kube_pod_name!=""}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80 = 80.0053
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone727-zonelet01' and kube_node_name = 'dal2-qz1-sr2-rk106-s21' and kube_pod_name = 'fabcon-manager-9zjcz'

Time:             12/06/2025 07:39 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/5f9d2351-5c34-4af7-b7d7-ff987623cc0f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179554418%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage
Description:  [Network] microservices are using over 80% of the memory limit - GENCTL-NETWORK
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{container_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager", kube_pod_name!=""}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80
